Safely invert a matrix with nearPD fallback

Source: R/sandwich.R
dot-safe_invert.Rd

Attempts solve(H_obs). If that fails (singular or near-singular), falls back to Matrix::nearPD to find the nearest positive-definite matrix, then inverts that.

Usage

.safe_invert(H_obs)

Arguments

H_obs

Square numeric matrix.

Value

The inverse of H_obs (or its nearest PD approximation).
